6:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold","children":"When to Hire"}]
7:["$","p",null,{"className":"text-zinc-300 leading-relaxed mb-4","children":"Staff are a major recurring expense. Hire too early and your daily profits vanish into wages. Hire too late and customers leave because shelves are empty or checkout lines are too long."}]
8:["$","p",null,{"className":"text-zinc-300 leading-relaxed mb-4","children":"The community-tested rule: hire your first employee when you have at least 8 shelves, daily revenue exceeds $800, and you find yourself spending more than 50% of your time at the checkout register."}]
9:["$","div",null,{"className":"p-4 rounded-lg bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-emerald-400 font-semibold mb-2","children":"Hiring Order"}],["$","ol",null,{"className":"text-zinc-300 text-sm space-y-1 list-decimal list-inside","children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"Cashier — Frees you from the register."}],["$","li",null,{"children":"Restocker — Keeps shelves full while you manage."}],["$","li",null,{"children":"Security — Reduces shoplifting losses in larger stores."}],["$","li",null,{"children":"Cleaner — Essential once you exceed 12 shelves."}]]}]]}]

Start employees at the default wage and raise it only when they reach higher skill levels or when morale drops."}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-zinc-300 leading-relaxed","children":"Low morale leads to slower work and higher quit rates. If an employee starts complaining, a small wage bump (10-15%) usually fixes it. High-turnover staff cost more in training than a modest raise."}]]}]
